text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Trainer! Guess what!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard a store that makes personalized wrestling
masks opened near the station!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yep! They can do animal masks, scary masks, cute
masks... all kinds!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I already have the mask my papa gave me, so I
don't really need one, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinkin' about this for a while now, and I
think you need one too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So let's go get you one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, I've been dragged off to the
station.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So what kind of mask do you want, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Since you're my partner, you should probably
have a condor mask, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Or, actually, maybe since I'm the ruler of the
skies, you should be the ruler of the land?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ughhh, I can't decide!
choice_data_list: What about an elephant, for strength?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A cheetah! That's an opponent I gotta compete
with some day! Safely, of course!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's great! A perfect match for the world's
strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, this mask is a present from me! Make sure to
wear it at my races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A bit later...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! You look so coooool! Just lookin' at you
makes me wanna run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An excited El Condor Pasa looks quite satisfied
with the finished cheetah mask.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept the gift gratefully, but politely refuse to
wear it in the stands.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
An elephant! Massive! Powerful! The absolute
strongest! Even stronger than me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, it's perfect for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You have to be strong if you're going to support
me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, this mask is a present from me! Make sure to
wear it at my races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A bit later...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! You look so strong! Overflowing with
power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An excited El Condor Pasa looks quite satisfied
with the finished elephant mask.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept the gift gratefully, but politely refuse to
wear it in the stands.
